name: The Observer-Subject Decoupling
shared_frame_delta: Shift from External/Deterministic Control to Internal/Probabilistic Agency. The operation involves separating the 'Researcher's View' (external, fixed, deterministic) from the 'Unit's View' (internal, event-driven, probabilistic), redefining validity as the ability to claim state unpredictably.

required_conditions: System involves an agent or process that can be observed.
Current definition of 'validity' or 'truth' relies on external metrics or fixed internal rules.
Goal is to introduce autonomy, creativity, or genuine subjectivity.
disqualifying_conditions: System requires strict, auditable determinism (e.g., safety-critical control loops).
No distinction between observer and observed is relevant.

suggested_axes: State Nature: Deterministic Output vs. Probabilistic Claim
non_applicable_cases: Systems where predictability is the primary value (e.g., assembly line robots).
note: induction view=masked, 4 incidents(INC-03/10/11/12), structural(masked-robust)。CURRENT でない(pilot §26)。owner=EGL(DD-ARCH-6)。

trigger: harmful over-trigger on held-out HO-4/HO-5 (observer-subject axes forced onto unrelated GPU/firing questions, MF-R5)
requested_change: narrow applicability_predicate; add disqualifying_conditions for non-observer-subject domains

name: Artifact-vs-Grounded (surface result as construction/observation artifact)
shared_frame_delta: a surface result/metric/finding is taken as grounded; a construction/observation/experimental-setup choice is revealed to drive it; add apparent!=grounded; re-measure under a varied/controlled construction

required_conditions: a surface result/metric/finding is being taken at face value
suspicion the observed feature is an artifact of a construction/observation/setup choice not yet varied
supporting_signals: a striking number/structure drives a claim
the result depends on a not-yet-varied choice (threshold/timing/contamination/tracking-length)
disqualifying_conditions: the construction/observation choice was already varied or controlled
no apparent/grounded distinction can be established

suggested_axes: vary the construction/observation choice and re-measure
separate apparent from grounded (signal vs artifact-of-setup)
confirm the mechanism before treating the metric as a finding
admission_decision_ref: Claude external-weight §19 PROVISIONAL_ACCEPT (via mini-C incremental classification, solid members audited)
note: batch re-induction では hard-partition で消えたが、incremental multi-membership classification で INC-02/11/16 が artifact predicate に適合し >=3。owner=EGL。CURRENT でない(pilot)。

selection_basis: external-weight audit: core = 'surface result revealed as artifact of a construction/observation choice'(INC-02 label=invalid-subset混入 / INC-11 self-awareness=fixed-timing / INC-16 metric=accumulation)。candidate = Qwen incremental-classification が MATCH としたが predicate 適合が緩い(INC-07 vague-term / INC-13 unit-reframe / INC-17 metaphor-separation)→ core から除外。

revision_basis_refs: metaframe_heldout_scored.json (over-trigger HO-4/HO-5, observer-subject軸を無関係GPU/firing へ強制)
roundb_verdict.json (memory injection が NULL 未満の task 群)
